description: Verify seed-demo.ts already covers all required tables (ai_care_plans, consent_records, capacity_assessments, regulatory_notifications, smart_handovers, handover_actions, environmental_readings, admission_referrals, admission_matches) with 30 days of demo data. All tables are already seeded per exploration - but verify completeness and ensure all tables generate adequate volume of data spanning 30 days.
steps: Step 1: Review backend/src/utils/seed-demo.ts to confirm all 9 tables are seeded. Based on exploration, ALL are already present: admission_referrals (line ~1755), admission_matches (line ~1771), ai_care_plans (line ~1792), consent_records (line ~1821), capacity_assessments (line ~1839), regulatory_notifications (line ~1855), smart_handovers (line ~1880), handover_actions (line ~1895), environmental_readings (line ~1910). Verify these generate 30 days of data.

Step 2: Check that environmental_readings generates data for the full 30 days. Currently it only generates 7 days of data (for day = 0; day < 7). Change this to 30 days to match the requirement. IMPORTANT: 30 days * 24 hours * 5 zones = 3600 rows which is a lot - use a sampling approach (every 4 hours instead of every hour) for days older than 7, or just increase to 30 days with reduced hourly frequency.
Step 3: Check that smart_handovers generates data for the full 30 days. Currently it only generates 7 days. Change this to 30 days of handover data.

Step 4: Verify that ai_care_plans, consent_records, regulatory_notifications, admission_referrals have date ranges spanning 30 days in their created_at fields. The current code uses daysAgo(randInt(3,15)), daysAgo(randInt(10,60)), etc. - these already cover 30 days or more. No changes needed for those.
Step 5: Run `cd backend && npm run build` to confirm seed-demo.ts compiles correctly after changes.
acceptance_criteria: environmental_readings generates data spanning 30 days (not just 7)
smart_handovers generates data spanning 30 days (not just 7)
All 9 required tables remain seeded in seed-demo.ts
Backend builds successfully after changes: cd backend && npm run build
